all.critique:
Below are some observations and potential issues found in the analysis:

1. Alternating Update Details (Medium)
 • The analysis correctly describes the alternating update schedule and even points out that with τ₁ = 0 the synthetic eigenbasis (U′_K) is never updated. However, it does not a) explain exactly how the code “freezes” the gradients or prevents parameter updates on the branch that is not active and b) specify whether separate optimizers or parameter groups (with different learning rates
